issue.author: shao-hua-li

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Reduced:
```llvm
define void @test() {
entry:
  br i1 false, label %loop2, label %loop1

loop1:
  br label %loop2

loop2:
  br i1 true, label %exit, label %loop1

exit:
  call void @dummy()
  ret void
}

declare void @dummy()
```

Presumably the LiveBlocks logic isn't correct for irreducable loops.

issue.title: Wrong code at -O1 on x86_64-linux_gnu (InstComine)

tests.test_body:
declare void @dummy()

define void @irreducible() {
entry:
  br i1 false, label %loop2, label %loop1

loop1:                                            ; preds = %loop2, %entry
  call void @dummy()
  br label %loop2

loop2:                                            ; preds = %loop1, %entry
  call void @dummy()
  br i1 true, label %exit, label %loop1

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop2
  call void @dummy()
  ret void
}

declare void @dummy()

define void @really_unreachable() {
entry:
  ret void

unreachable:                                      ; No predecessors!
  call void @dummy()
  ret void
}

declare void @dummy()

define void @really_unreachable_predecessor() {
entry:
  br i1 false, label %bb, label %exit

unreachable:                                      ; No predecessors!
  call void @dummy()
  br label %bb

bb:                                               ; preds = %unreachable, %entry
  call void @dummy()
  ret void

exit:                                             ; preds = %entry
  call void @dummy()
  ret void
}
